sections.title: After the completion of In Search of the Myreque
After speaking with him at least once

lines.speaker: Stranger
lines.text: I think we've been through this before, haven't we?

lines.speaker: Stranger
lines.text: Hello friend. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, sorry. I thought you were someone else.

lines.speaker: Stranger
lines.text: Who did you think I was?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I thought you were that dirty murderer Vanstrom.

lines.speaker: Stranger
lines.text: Woah! It sounds like you've got a score to settle!
